sub_pixel_system.notes: Turn-based tactical strategy game; sub-pixel precision not documented or relevant

special_mechanics.name: Movement Modes
special_mechanics.description: Mercs can move in multiple modes: walk, run, crouch, crawl, swim. Movement occurs on tactical isometric screen with sector-based navigation on strategic map

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Mercs can climb onto roofs of flat-roofed buildings

tier_notes: Jagged Alliance 2 is a turn-based tactical RPG where precise physics parameters (jump height, gravity, acceleration) are not mechanically relevant. Movement is action-point based on strategic/tactical grids rather than continuous physics-based locomotion. No documented movement physics values available.
